## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

What problem it solves / which issue or TODO item it addresses.

Closes #

## How tested

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] Tested on device/emulator (note OS):

## Checklist

- [ ] Focused diff — no unrelated refactors
- [ ] No new network calls, analytics, ads, or trackers
- [ ] No secrets/keystores committed
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` / `TODO.md` if relevant
